query: Tokyo population latest reported 2024 2025 official population
answer: Tokyo's population in 2024 was 37,115,000, and it is projected to be 37,036,000 in 2025. The population has seen a slight decline due to fewer inflows. The latest official estimate for 2025 is 14,273,066.

results.snippet: Tokyo's 2026 population is now estimated at 36,953,600. In 1950, the population of Tokyo was 11,274,600. Tokyo experienced a decrease of -82,600 residents

results.title: Current Population Estimates as of October 1, 2024
results.snippet: The population increased in Tokyo-to and Saitama-ken. Tokyo-to had the highest rate of increase in population. The population decreased in 45 prefectures.
